sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Akha nuai-ah dah ciang belh ding muan huai a,
K alungsim in tawldamna nuam ngah
Leitungah nopna hong pia thei om lo-a,
Tua lai-ah nopna thupha ka ngah hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A kha nuai-ah nopna manpha mahmah a,
Nuntak haksatna bei dongin beel ning;
dal, siatna’n hong su thei lo a,
Jesuh’ sung khawl leng, lungmuang tawntung ning.
